context: Control Plane detail for the seven-plane operating system. Covers session run event dispatch attention and approval truth.

sections.content: Control Plane owns Session, WorkOrder, Run, Event, Attention, Approval, and Dispatch truth. Control Plane is operator-facing registry and control surface. Control Plane consumes runtime facts from Harness Runtime Plane and business intent from Portfolio Project Plane.
Must_not = CLI-specific runtime details, gateway behavior, or raw knowledge storage. Current posture = active-seed. agent-hub is admitted seed for Control Plane implementation.

artifacts.usage: Lookup table for primary Control Plane objects and ownership responsibilities.

rows: bound to Session and runtime updates
fed by runtime and supporting signal producers
bridges portfolio intent to runtime execution

changelog.delta: Initial seven-plane pilot module for Control Plane.
